# DNG Image Properties

**API Collection**

Metadata keys for the Digital Negative (DNG) archival format.

## Overview

For more information about the DNG format, see *Digital Negative (DNG) Specification* at [https://www.adobe.com].

## Dictionary

- **kCGImagePropertyDNGDictionary**: A dictionary of key-value pairs for an image that uses the Digital Negative (DNG) archival format.

## Quality

- **kCGImagePropertyDNGBaselineSharpness**: The amount of sharpening required for this camera model.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGLinearResponseLimit**: The fraction of the encoding range, above which the response may become significantly non-linear.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGChromaBlurRadius**: A hint to the DNG reader about how much chroma blur to apply to the image.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGAntiAliasStrength**: A hint to the DNG reader about how strong the camera’s antialias filter is.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGShadowScale**: A tag that Adobe Camera Raw uses to control the sensitivity of its Shadows slider.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGBestQualityScale**: The scale factor to apply to the default scale to achieve the best quality image size.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGDefaultScale**: The default scale factors for each direction to convert the image to square pixels.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGLinearizationTable**: A lookup table that maps stored values into linear values.

## Exposure

- **kCGImagePropertyDNGBaselineExposure**: The amount by which to adjust the zero point of the exposure, specified in EV units.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGBaselineNoise**: The relative noise level of the camera model at an ISO of 100.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGBaselineExposureOffset**: The amount of EV units to add to the baseline exposure during image rendering.

## Color Balance

- **kCGImagePropertyDNGAnalogBalance**: The analog or digital gain that applies to the stored raw values.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGAsShotNeutral**: The selected white balance at the time of capture, encoded as the coordinates of a neutral color in linear reference space values.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGAsShotWhiteXY**: The selected white balance at the time of capture, encoded as x-y chromaticity coordinates.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGBayerGreenSplit**: A value that specifies how closely green pixels in the blue/green rows track the green pixels in red/green rows.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGForwardMatrix1**: A matrix that maps white balanced camera colors to XYZ D50 colors.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGForwardMatrix2**: A matrix that maps white balanced camera colors to XYZ D50 colors.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGDefaultBlackRender**: A hint to the raw converter about how to handle the black point during rendering.

## Color Calibration

- **kCGImagePropertyDNGBlackLevelRepeatDim**: The repeat pattern size for the black level tag.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGBlackLevel**: The zero light encoding level, specified as a repeating pattern.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGBlackLevelDeltaH**: The difference between the zero-light encoding level for each column and the baseline zero-light encoding level.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGBlackLevelDeltaV**: The difference between the zero-light encodoing level for each row and the baseline zero-light encoding level.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGWhiteLevel**: The saturated encoding level for the raw sample values.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGCalibrationIlluminant1**: The illuminant for the first set of color calibration tags.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGCalibrationIlluminant2**: The illuminant for an optional second set of color calibration tags.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGColorMatrix1**: A transformation matrix that converts XYZ values to reference camera native color spaces, under the first calibration illuminant.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGColorMatrix2**: A transformation matrix that converts XYZ values to reference camera native color spaces, under the second calibration illuminant.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGCameraCalibration1**: A matrix that transforms reference camera native space values to camera-native space values under the first calibration illuminant.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGCameraCalibration2**: A matrix that transforms reference camera native space values to camera-native space values under the second calibration illuminant.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGReductionMatrix1**: A reduction matrix that converts color camera-native space values to XYZ values, under the first calibration illuminant.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGReductionMatrix2**: A reduction matrix that converts color camera-native space values to XYZ values, under the second calibration illuminant.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGAsShotICCProfile**: A profile that specifies default color rendering from camera color-space coordinates into the ICC profile space.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGAsShotPreProfileMatrix**: A matrix to apply to the camera color-space coordinates before processing values through the ICC profile.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGCurrentICCProfile**: A profile that specifies default color rendering from camera color-space coordinates into the ICC profile space.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGCurrentPreProfileMatrix**: A matrix to apply to the current camera color-space coordinates before processing values through the ICC profile.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGColorimetricReference**: The colorimetric reference for the CIE XYZ values.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGCameraCalibrationSignature**: A string to match against the profile calibration signature for the selected camera profile.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGProfileCalibrationSignature**: A string that describes the calibration for the current profile.

## Crop Data

- **kCGImagePropertyDNGActiveArea**: The rectangle that defines the non-masked pixels of the sensor.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGMaskedAreas**: A list of non-overlapping rectangles that contain fully masked pixels in the image.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGDefaultCropOrigin**: The origin of the final image area, relative to the top-left corner of the active area rectangle.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGDefaultCropSize**: The size of the final image area, in raw image coordinates.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGDefaultUserCrop**: A default user-crop rectangle in relative coordinates.

## RAW Data

- **kCGImagePropertyDNGOriginalRawFileName**: The file name of the original raw file.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGOriginalRawFileData**: The compressed contents of the original raw file.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGNoiseReductionApplied**: The amount of noise reduction applied to the raw data on a scale of 0.0 to 1.0.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGNewRawImageDigest**: An MD5 digest of the raw image data.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGOriginalRawFileDigest**: An MD5 digest of the data stored for the original raw file data.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGRawImageDigest**: A modified MD5 digest of the raw image data.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGOriginalDefaultFinalSize**: THe default final size of the larger original file that was the source of this proxy.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGOriginalBestQualityFinalSize**: The best-quality final size of the larger original file that was the source of this proxy.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGOriginalDefaultCropSize**: The default crop size of the larger original file that was the source of this proxy.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGRawToPreviewGain**: The gain between the main raw IFD and the preview IFD that contains this tag.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGNoiseProfile**: The amount of noise in the raw image.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGCFALayout**: The spatial layout of the CFA.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGCFAPlaneColor**: A mapping between the values in the CFA pattern tag and the plane numbers in linear raw space.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGOpcodeList1**: The list of opcodes to apply to the raw image, as read directly from the file.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGOpcodeList2**: THe list of opcodes to apply to the raw image, after mapping it to linear reference values.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGOpcodeList3**: The list of opcodes to apply to the raw image, after demosaicing it.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGWarpRectilinear**: An opcode to apply a warp to an image to correct for geometric distortion and lateral chromatic aberration for rectilinear lenses.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGWarpFisheye**: An opcode to unwrap an image captued with a fisheye lens and map it to a perspective projection.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGFixVignetteRadial**: An opcode to apply a gain function to an image to correct vignetting.

## Image File Data

- **kCGImagePropertyDNGPrivateData**: Private data that manufacturers may store with an image and use in their own converters.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGMakerNoteSafety**: A Boolean value that tells the DNG reader whether the EXIF MakerNote tag is safe to preserve.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGRawDataUniqueID**: A 16-byte unique identifier for the raw image data.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGSubTileBlockSize**: The size of rectangular blocks that tiles use to group pixels.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGRowInterleaveFactor**: The number of interleaved fields for the rows of the image.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGBackwardVersion**: The oldest version for which a file is compatible.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGVersion**: An encoding of the four-tier version number.

## Profile Data

- **kCGImagePropertyDNGExtraCameraProfiles**: A list of file offsets to extra camera profiles.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGAsShotProfileName**: A string containing the name of the “as shot” camera profile, if any.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGProfileHueSatMapDims**: The number of input samples in each dimension of the hue/saturation/value mapping tables.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGProfileHueSatMapData1**: The data for the first hue/saturation/value mapping table.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGProfileHueSatMapData2**: The data for the second hue/saturation/value mapping table.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGProfileHueSatMapEncoding**: The encoding option to use when indexing into a 3D look table during raw conversion.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGProfileToneCurve**: The default tone curve to apply when processing the image as a starting point for user adjustments.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGProfileName**: A string containing the name of the camera profile.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGProfileEmbedPolicy**: The usage rules for the camera profile.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGProfileCopyright**: The copyright information for the camera profile.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGProfileLookTableDims**: The number of input samples in each dimentsion of a default “look” table.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGProfileLookTableData**: The default “look” table to apply when processing the image as a starting point for user adjustment.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGProfileLookTableEncoding**: The encoding option to use when indexing into a 3D look table during raw conversion.

## Preview

- **kCGImagePropertyDNGPreviewApplicationName**: The name of the app that created the preview stored in the IFD.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGPreviewApplicationVersion**: The version number of the app that created the preview stored in the IFD.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGPreviewSettingsName**: The name of the conversion settings for the preview.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGPreviewSettingsDigest**: A unique ID of the conversion settings used to render the preview.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGPreviewColorSpace**: The color space associated with the rendered preview.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGPreviewDateTime**: The date and time for the render of the preview.

## Camera Details

- **kCGImagePropertyDNGLensInfo**: Information about the lens used for the image.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGUniqueCameraModel**: A unique, nonlocalized name for the camera model.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGLocalizedCameraModel**: The localized camera model name.
- **kCGImagePropertyDNGCameraSerialNumber**: The camera serial number.

## Format-Specific Properties

- **CIFF Image Properties**: Metadata keys for the Camera Image File Format (CIFF) image format.
- **GIF Image Properties**: Metadata keys for the Graphics Interchange Format (GIF).
- **HEIC Image Properties**: Metadata keys for the High Efficiency Image Container (HEIC) format.
- **JFIF Image Properties**: Metadata keys for the JPEG File Interchange Format (JFIF).
- **PNG Image Properties**: Metadata keys for the Portable Network Graphics (PNG) format.
- **TGA Image Properties**: Metadata keys for the Truevision Graphics Adapter (TGA) format.
- **TIFF Image Properties**: Metadata keys for the Tagged Image File Format (TIFF).
- **8BIM Image Properties**: Metadata keys for the Adobe Photoshop image format.
